name: Stoke Charity
overview: Stoke Charity is a small village in the parish of Wonston, in the City of Winchester district, set on the chalk-stream River Dever about 6 miles north of Winchester - half a mile east of Wonston and 1.5 miles west of Sutton Scotney. Its medieval Church of St Mary and St Michael, largely Norman and standing in a field by a lake, is celebrated for its monuments and brasses; John Betjeman called it 'gem-like' and it features in Simon Jenkins's 1,000 Best English Churches.
character: A small, tranquil chalk-stream village of thatched and timber-framed cottages along a single hillside street.
amenities: The Norman Church of St Mary and St Michael
River Dever and surrounding downland walks
Everyday shops and services in nearby Sutton Scotney
No shop, pub or school within Stoke Charity itself

schools.name: Micheldever CE Primary School
schools.distance: ~2 mi east in Micheldever (Dever Valley Federation)

commutes.notes: Nearest station, about 3 miles, with direct trains to London Waterloo (fastest about 1h 2m)
About 6 miles south for city shops, services and fast trains; the A34 and M3 are close by
Direct from Micheldever on South Western Railway

prices.summary: Stock is dominated by period thatched and timber-framed cottages with some larger houses, in very low transaction volumes; the quiet Dever-valley setting and fast London commute support a premium. See the live Rightmove sold-price page for current figures.

thingsToDo: Visiting the celebrated Norman Church of St Mary and St Michael
Walking along the River Dever and the surrounding downland
Exploring nearby Sutton Scotney and Micheldever
placesToEat: Pubs and eateries in neighbouring Sutton Scotney and Micheldever
pros: Fast direct trains to London from Micheldever, about 3 miles away, with quick M3/A34 access
cons: No shop, pub or school in the village
Limited public transport, so a car is essential
Quiet and somewhat isolated for those wanting amenities on the doorstep
whoItSuits: Commuters and downsizers wanting a peaceful chalk-valley village with a fast London rail link from nearby Micheldever.
